title: BLACK_MC optimization
description: This is a relatively aggressive Minecraft optimization modpack, and it also provides controller support（1.21.8）.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/957d901a8f7bab0fc7637a79c1ba4a82312a157f.png)


# What is this?

This is a relatively aggressive Minecraft optimization modpack, You can report his issue at https://message.bilibili.com/#/whisper/mid3493125613947396.

# Function

It can boost your game from 10 FPS to 100 FPS and supports controller input on certain versions,This bundle also includes the ICONS resource pack.(1.21.8)

# Minimum requirement

JDK24-8

OpenGL 3.0

4GB game RAM

# What is the purpose of this  modpack？

It is so that more players with low-end versions of Minecraft can play Minecraft.

# On what kind of device is the FPS shown in the picture achieved?

This kind of FPS is implemented using the following configuration:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Interl(R) Core(TM) i5-4460


8.0GBDDR3


NVIDIA GeForce GT 710



</details>
